title: stelis sellaformis
intro: Stelis sellaformis is a species of orchid, commonly known as a type of epiphytic orchid that grows in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Stelis sellaformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits.
